result.stdout:
namechk v0.2.0
----------------

Usage: namechk [names...]

names:
   list of names to check for the availability

Ex:
   namechk miniature-fiesta reimagined-engine scaling-adventure

   miniature-fiesta is available
   reimagined-engine is unavailable
   scaling-adventure is unavailable
